name: Hamburger Corn Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large frying pan, sauté the hamburger and chopped onion until the meat is cooked through.
2. Add the rest of the ingredients to the pan: corn soup, mushroom soup, sour cream, pimento, salt, and pepper.
3. Stir in 3 cups of cooked and drained medium broad noodles.
4. Transfer the mixture into a casserole dish.
5. Top with additional chow mein noodles.
6. Dot with margarine.
7. Bake for 45 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
